programme.title: Race For The Yankee Zephyr
programme.desc: In a lake high in the mountains of New Zealand, hunter Gibbie Gibson discovers a plane wreck from WW II. Helicopter pilot Barney helps the father and daughter out at the risk of his own life.

programme.title: NOSFERATU
programme.desc: The gothic fable follows a young woman who is being haunted by an ancient Transylvanian vampire, bringing untold horror with him.

programme.title: JUDAS AND THE BLACK MESSIAH
programme.desc: Offered a plea deal by the FBI, William O'Neal infiltrates the Illinois chapter of the Black Panther Party as a secret informant to gather intelligence on Chairman Fred Hampton.

programme.title: INDICTMENT: THE MCMARTIN TRIAL
programme.desc: A fact-based drama based on the longest and most expensive trial in American history that ended without a single conviction.

programme.desc: An apartment manager unwittingly sets himself up for a peculiar adventure when he rescues a seemingly normal young woman from the pool he maintains.
